title: Oneblock Ultimate
body:
## **Oneblock Ultimate**  
A modern recreation of a classic Oneblock experience — rebuilt for NeoForge 1.21.1.

**Oneblock Ultimate** aims to deliver a polished, flexible, and stable environment for Oneblock gameplay.  
Inspired by the original *Oneblock Ultimate* from TL Mods (which was never republished), this version is recreated entirely from scratch, redesigned for modern systems, and built to support any Oneblock map you choose to play.

---

### **Important Notice**  
This modpack **does not include any maps**.  
You must supply your own Oneblock world.  
To simplify setup, the pack includes a **custom FancyMenu startup prompt** that appears when the game launches, offering links to download recommended maps.

---

## **Why Oneblock Ultimate?**

***A clean, modern Oneblock base*** 
Designed specifically for Oneblock gameplay — no unnecessary extras, no forced worlds. Just a stable, optimized platform for the map you prefer.

***NeoForge 1.21.1 optimized***  
Built on the latest NeoForge ecosystem for modern performance, compatibility, and stability.

***Flexible and customizable***  
Since maps aren't bundled, you're free to pick any Oneblock version: classic, modded, themed, or challenge-based.

***Lightweight and stable***  
Carefully selected mods enhance progression, QoL, performance, and long-term world stability.
